page_content:
MUSC444 Wind and Percussion Literature (1 Credit)

Recital program notes and written projects in wind or percussion literature.

Prerequisite: Permission of ARHU-School of Music department. Corequisite: MUSP420 or MUSP419.

MUSC445 Survey of the Opera (3 Credits)

A study of the music, librettos and composers of the standard operas. Prerequisite: MUSC330 and MUSC331; or students who have taken courses with comparable content may contact the department.
